SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY EDWARD CHU--MANDARIN INTERPRETER.
